name: Cosmos Lines
author: Poki
description: Cosmos Lines is a relaxing puzzle games in which you draw lines to fill up a grid. Every line can only be as long as the number on it says, so fitting them all together in the right way will take some thinking power. Don’t worry if you get stuck, you can always ask for a helpful hint! Can you finish all the levels? How to play Cosmos Lines? Click and drag to make lines! Who created Cosmos Lines? Cosmos Lines is created by Insality Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Cosmos Lines for free? You can play Cosmos Lines for free on Poki. Can I play Cosmos Lines on mobile devices and desktop? Cosmos Lines can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
